arts.ttl: Bayer 04 Leverkusen target Swiss defender Albian Hajdari
arts.sum: Sky Germany currently reports that Bayer 04 Leverkusen are targeting another specific defender.

arts.ttl: Jonas Hofmann will look to leave Bayer Leverkusen in the summer
arts.sum: Bild reports that Bayer Leverkusen’s Jonas Hofmann will look to leave the club in the summer as he is in search of more playing time. Since moving to Leverkusen in 2023,…

arts.ttl: Barcelona set to make Jonathan Tah call imminently
arts.sum: Barcelona have made it a habit to pursue some of the best free agents on the market in recent years as their financial situation took its toll, with the likes of Eric Garcia, Ilkay Gundogan and Andreas Christensen all arriving on a free from the Premier League. In recent months it has looked as if […] The post Barcelona set to make Jonathan Tah call imminently appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti considering Real Madrid future over Xabi Alonso speculation
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti is reportedly considering his future as Real Madrid manager.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso praises Boniface: "At a good level again"
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso has praised Victor Boniface after the striker scored on his return to the starting XI against VfL Bochum.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso’s Bayer Leverkusen rival Barcelona for summer transfer target
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have been joined in the hunt for a leading summer transfer target by German outfit Bayer Leverkusen. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who point towards Andrei…

arts.ttl: Leverkusen linked with FC Lugano talent as potential Tah cover
arts.sum: Albian Hajdari could be on his way to the BayArena this summer.

arts.ttl: BILD: Kovar's future at Leverkusen rests in Xabi Alonso's hands tomorrow
arts.sum: Germany's leading tabloid believes the goalkeeper's time at Die Werkself could be decided by his involvement in their German cup game tomorrow.

arts.ttl: Preview: Arminia Bielefeld vs Bayer Leverkusen: Team news and how to stream
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen will look to make it successive DFB Pokal finals when they travel to Arminia Bielefeld on Tuesday night, but they will have to do it against the Bundesliga…

arts.ttl: Alonso gives update on Tella, Wirtz and Tapsoba ahead of Bielefeld clash
arts.sum: Bayer 04 Leverkusen coach Xabi Alonso gave an update on Nathan Tella, Edmond Tapsoba and Florian Wirtz at a press conference ahead of Tuesday's DFB-Pokal semi-final against Arminia Bielefeld.
